languages.text: "Готовим из тех, кто от яда Погонщицы искупление принял. Если не подохнете и не траванетесь так, что жить не захочется, то какое-то время всякие яды вам не опаснее водички покажутся. Если".

"We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."
languages.original_text: "Готовим из тех, кто от яда Погонщицы искупление принял. Если не подохнете и не траванетесь так, что жить не захочется, то какое-то время всякие яды вам не опаснее водички покажутся. Если".

traits.locale_text: "We scrap it together from those finished off by the Drover's poison, and if you are not so seriously poisoned that you don't want to live, then for a time all kinds of poisons will pose no more danger to you than water. If."

"We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."

"Well, our toxinologists train their bodies with measured doses of poisons from childhood. But you are no longer a child. There is still a way, but it has not been fully tested and could be dangerous. You have to drink a special concoction. If you don't die, and if you are not so seriously poisoned that you don't want to live, then for a time all kinds of poisons and toxins will pose no more danger to you than water. If."

"We scrap it together from those finished off by the Drover's poison, and if you are not so seriously poisoned that you don't want to live, then for a time all kinds of poisons will pose no more danger to you than water. If."

"We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."

"We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."

languages.text: 「さて、我々の毒専門家は子どもの頃から計量した毒を少しずつ取り込んで体を鍛えます。ですがあなたはもう子どもではありません。まだ手はありますが、十分に試されておらず危険かもしれません。特別な調合薬を飲んでもらいます。死なず、そして生きていたくなくなるほどの重い中毒にもならなければ、しばらくの間、あらゆる毒や毒素は水と同じくらい無害になります。もし、ですが」
languages.original_text: "Well, our toxinologists train their bodies with measured doses of poisons from childhood. But you are no longer a child. There is still a way, but it has not been fully tested and could be dangerous. You have to drink a special concoction. If you don't die, and if you are not so seriously poisoned that you don't want to live, then for a time all kinds of poisons and toxins will pose no more danger to you than water. If."

traits.locale_text: 「さて、我々の毒専門家は子どもの頃から計量した毒を少しずつ取り込んで体を鍛えます。ですがあなたはもう子どもではありません。まだ手はありますが、十分に試されておらず危険かもしれません。特別な調合薬を飲んでもらいます。死なず、そして生きていたくなくなるほどの重い中毒にもならなければ、しばらくの間、あらゆる毒や毒素は水と同じくらい無害になります。もし、ですが。」

languages.text: « Nous le préparons à partir des cadavres des victimes tuées par le poison du Chasseur. Si, j'ai bien dit si, vous n'êtes pas {mf|empoisonné|empoisonnée} au point d'en mourir ou d'appeler la mort de vos vœux, pendant quelque temps, vous êtes {mf|immunisé|immunisée} contre toutes les substances toxiques, quelles qu'elles soient. »
languages.original_text: "We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."

traits.locale_text: « Nous le préparons à partir des cadavres des victimes tuées par le poison du Chasseur. Si, j'ai bien dit si, vous n'êtes pas {mf|empoisonné|empoisonnée} au point d'en mourir ou d'appeler la mort de vos vœux, pendant quelque temps, vous êtes {mf|immunisé|immunisée} contre toutes les substances toxiques, quelles qu'elles soient. »

languages.text: "Çoban'ın zehriyle ölenlerin kalıntılarından demleriz. Ölecek veya ölmüş olmayı dileyecek kadar zehirlenmezseniz o zaman size tehdit oluşturmaz."
languages.original_text: "We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."

traits.locale_text: "Çoban'ın zehriyle ölenlerin kalıntılarından demleriz. Ölecek veya ölmüş olmayı dileyecek kadar zehirlenmezseniz o zaman size tehdit oluşturmaz."

languages.text: «Lo elaboramos usando cadáveres de víctimas del veneno del Pastor. Si la ponzoña no {mf|lo|la} mata ni le hace desear morirse, ningún veneno le supondrá más riesgo que el agua durante un tiempo. Si no muere».
languages.original_text: "We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."

traits.locale_text: «Lo elaboramos usando cadáveres de víctimas del veneno del Pastor. Si la ponzoña no {mf|lo|la} mata ni le hace desear morirse, ningún veneno le supondrá más riesgo que el agua durante un tiempo. Si no muere».

languages.text: “我们用被拒生花毒死的人熬制的。如果您所中的毒不至于让您死掉，或者让您生不如死，那么在一段时间内，各种毒素对您来说就跟普通的水一样。当然，前提是您能挺过来。”
languages.original_text: "We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."

traits.locale_text: “我们用被拒生花毒死的人熬制的。如果您所中的毒不至于让您死掉，或者让您生不如死，那么在一段时间内，各种毒素对您来说就跟普通的水一样。当然，前提是您能挺过来。”

languages.text: "Wir haben es aus den Giftopfern des Treibers gebraut. Falls Ihr nicht so stark vergiftet seid, dass Ihr sterbt oder sterben wollt, sind alle Arten von Giften für Euch nicht gefährlicher als Wasser ... falls.
languages.original_text: "We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben es aus den Giftopfern des Treibers gebraut. Falls Ihr nicht so stark vergiftet seid, dass Ihr sterbt oder sterben wollt, sind alle Arten von Giften für Euch nicht gefährlicher als Wasser ... falls.
